title: Four years after invading Ukraine, Russia sinks deeper into authoritarianism and repression
subhed: Since 2022, Vladimir Putin's regime has hardened relentlessly. The war has gone hand in hand with increasingly harsh control over society, all against a backdrop of mounting economic difficulties.

title: Iran says an 'unprecedented' deal is 'within reach' ahead of US talks
'The US Supreme Court decision on tariffs helps dispel the image of an institution that has become entirely subservient to the president'
Four years of war in Ukraine: Odesa's complex 'derussification'
subhed: The southern Ukrainian city, long under the influence of Russia and then the Soviet Union due to its access to the Black Sea, is continuing the process of dismantling the pro-Russian narrative and reclaiming the city, much to the chagrin of those who wish to preserve its Russian 'cultural heritage.'

title: 'Who could have imagined that the federal agency for workplace equality would one day accuse Coca-Cola of anti-male segregation?'
subhed: A subcontractor for the American soft drink giant is facing legal action after hosting a 2024 networking event exclusively for 250 women. The federal equal opportunity commission is now reasserting what Le Monde economy journalist Isabelle Chaperon calls the law of the jungle.

title: Cristel, the high-end cookware specialist, to open a second production site
subhed: Defying the trend among many French manufacturers, this company based in Doubs, northeastern France, is facing soaring demand.

title: Who will replace Mexican druglord 'El Mencho'?
subhed: After the army killed on Sunday the leader of Mexico's most powerful cartel, David Mora, a researcher at the International Crisis Group, expresses concern about the violence that could result from divisions within the criminal group and from the ambitions of rival cartels.
byline: Interview by Anne Vigna (Mexico City (Mexico) correspondent)

Dark Bank: American suspected of leading an international criminal organization extradited to France
subhed: Huzefa Hafiz Ismail arrived on French soil on Friday. He was arrested in August 2024 in Texas at the request of French judicial authorities, who suspect him of leading a vast money laundering network.

title: The 'impossible' task of counting deaths at sea
subhed: The International Organization for Migration and migrant aid NGOs simultaneously record deaths at sea in the Mediterranean and Atlantic, but often come up with very different figures. Why?

title: With expected US retreat, Germany seeks to strengthen its role within NATO
subhed: Berlin has invested hundreds of billions of euros to rearm since Russia's invasion of Ukraine in 2022 and aims to play a major role within the North Atlantic Alliance, particularly as the US moves toward isolation.
